testcase.name: test_gzip_not_forced_on_small_payload_origin

failure.message: AssertionError: small 25-byte response was gzip'd — minimum_size=1024 threshold NOT respected. Content-Encoding='gzip'. Body='{"message":"Hello World"}'. Likely cause: SecurityHeadersMiddleware (BaseHTTPMiddleware) strips Content-Length and streams body with more_body=True on the first chunk, forcing GZipResponder into 'streaming' branch. assert 'gzip' != 'gzip'

testcase.failure: tests/test_phase_optimization.py:101: in test_gzip_not_forced_on_small_payload_origin assert ce != "gzip", ( E AssertionError: small 25-byte response was gzip'd — minimum_size=1024 threshold NOT respected. Content-Encoding='gzip'. Body='{"message":"Hello World"}'. Likely cause: SecurityHeadersMiddleware (BaseHTTPMiddleware) strips Content-Length and streams body with more_body=True on the first chunk, forcing GZipResponder into 'streaming' branch. E assert 'gzip' != 'gzip'

testcase.name: test_canonical_in_static_index_html

failure.message: AssertionError: no <link rel=canonical> in static index.html assert None

testcase.failure: tests/test_phase_optimization.py:347: in test_canonical_in_static_index_html assert m, "no <link rel=canonical> in static index.html" E AssertionError: no <link rel=canonical> in static index.html E assert None

testcase.name: test_admin_login_returns_200
testcase.failure: tests/test_phase_optimization.py:386: in test_admin_login_returns_200 assert r.status_code == 200, f"login failed: {r.status_code} {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: login failed: 429 {"detail":"Too many requests. Please slow down and try again shortly."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
